title: rubus × perfoliosus
intro: Rubus × perfoliosus, also known as the black raspberry, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between Rubus idaeus (European raspberry) and Rubus occidentalis (American black raspberry). This plant contains anthocyanins, a type of antioxidant that has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer effects. The health benefits of Rubus × perfoliosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through various methods, including making teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
